summary: Read-only plan: #42099 is the only hydrated open candidate and remains the live canonical issue for the duplicate plugin ID warning on gateway start. No closure, merge, security routing, or fix artifact is planned because the job blocks merge/fix/raise_pr and the existing-overlap PR #72409 is context only, not an actionable hydrated item.

actions.reason: #42099 is the sole hydrated open actionable item and the best surviving thread for this root cause; there is no hydrated duplicate or candidate fix to close, merge, or route.
